description_long: This house features a two-story main structure with a prominent dark gable roof and an attached single-story garage. The exterior walls are finished in a light stone or stucco, complemented by white-trimmed windows and railings. A wooden fence encloses a spacious yard that includes a gazebo, a playground with swings, a sandbox, and mature trees, creating a family-friendly outdoor environment. The driveway leads to a covered carport, bordered by decorative shrubs. The windows are arranged in both symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns, with a mix of rectangular and arched shapes. The main entryway is sheltered by a roofed porch supported by columns, adding a welcoming and traditional touch.
description: A two-story light-colored house with a dark gable roof, attached garage, fenced yard, gazebo, and playground. The design features a welcoming porch, decorative windows, and landscaped outdoor spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry porch, attached garage, driveway, and gazebo on the left.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, driveway, and a clear view of the fenced backyard with playground equipment.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, gazebo, playground, and the back facade of the house with multiple windows.
description_view_3: Angled view from the back corner, emphasizing the gazebo, trees, and the full extent of the fenced yard.
attribute_window_arrangement: mixed symmetrical and asymmetrical rows with arched and rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry features a covered porch with columns, steps, and a decorative overhang.
